title: Codex TUI Startup Guardrail
problem: Historical startup-readiness work superseded by helper-owned config/runtime checks and explicit local switch-journal conflict reporting; Codex auth, model cache, SQLite, and remote-control state are no longer inputs.

continue_policy.notes: This historical lane is complete and superseded. New startup-readiness work must use only helper-owned config/runtime state and the current switch journal.
